task: privacy attack on graph neural networks (node-level information extraction)
input: black-box access to a trained GNN model and the ability to add attacker-controlled nodes to the graph
output: inferred node label, neighboring links, and sensitive attributes of a victim node
backbone: infiltration-based attack (no specific GNN architecture; evaluated on GCN, GraphSAGE, GAT)
loss: not applicable (attack method, not a training objective)
key_idea: infiltrate the graph with attacker-created nodes that befriend the victim node to extract private information via black-box queries
